sourceNote: Union of (optional) Level-3 sheet Mastery words and headwords from L3 lesson 定表词 exports (see scripts/build-mastery-l3-from-lesson-library.mjs). Level 4 dedupes against Union(this, mastery-words-l0-l2.json).
